subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! The Wronged One hath turned toward thee from the precincts of the Most Great Prison and declareth: The Most Exalted Pen, in the nights and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین مظلوم از شطر سجن اعظم بتو توجه نموده و میفرماید قلم اعلی در لیالی و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition
